reason: Karpathy loop requires spawning CLI subagents for blind A/B/C eval (kiro-cli chat --agent eval-a/b/c). A full batch = ~10 experiments × 3 subagent calls each, with real inference time. In a manual interactive EOD run (not a scheduled overnight hook), running 30+ subagent calls serially is inappropriate. Protocol specifies 'First-experiment verification mandatory' before running unattended batches — we have no human here to verify. Deferring to next automated EOD hook run.

suggestions.name: Restructure the rw-tracker.md daily tracker section to lead with 'hard thing status'
suggestions.rationale: Structural over cosmetic (soul principle). The hard thing should be the first thing Richard sees daily, not buried in scorecard. L1 streak at 22 workdays zero is a structural failure — the routine isn't surfacing the right cue.
suggestions.five_levels: L1 (meta — the system that tracks L1 output)
suggestions.expected_impact: If cue is more prominent, completion probability should rise. Measure: days to next L1 artifact ship.

suggestions.name: Decouple 'send Testing Approach v5' as an atomic 5-min task from any Testing Approach work block
suggestions.rationale: The v5 doc has PUBLISH verdict (8.4/10). It's been not-sent for 22 workdays despite being the hard thing. The bottleneck is SEND, not WRITE. Schedule a standalone 5-min 'send Brandon the file' task that doesn't require any additional work.
suggestions.expected_impact: One-shot completion. Either it ships tomorrow or we learn the real blocker isn't friction (it's something else — fear, perfectionism, belief the doc isn't ready).

suggestions.name: Add 'delegation escalation threshold' to device.md — after 21 days blocked, auto-create workaround task
suggestions.rationale: Vijeth footer (32d) and Andes data (35d) both failed and stalled. The system noticed the block but never escalated. Structural intervention: 21-day threshold triggers creation of a new Asana task in the responsible person's escalation chain (their manager, or a workaround owner).
suggestions.expected_impact: Currently 2 tasks stalled > 30 days silently. After change, 0 tasks stalled > 21 days silently.

underexplored_priors_top: hands × (COMPRESS, ADD, RESTRUCTURE, REMOVE, REWORD, MERGE, SPLIT) — hands.md has zero experiments. Natural next target.
next_action: Next scheduled EOD hook run (automated) should execute karpathy-loop.sh with max_batches=2 (20 experiments) as a verification run. If that succeeds, raise to full cadence.
